carousel_notes: First slide is always the cover (headline + hero photo). Middle slides are photo + caption pairs. Last slide is always the branded closing slide.

event_name.description: Full event name. e.g. 'Annual Sports Day 2025'

cover_headline.description: Big punchy headline for the first slide. e.g. 'Champions are made here.'

cover_image_path.description: Best photo from the event for the cover slide

slides.description: List of inner slides. Each slide has image_path and caption.

caption.description: Short slide caption. e.g. 'The 100m sprint — nothing but heart.'

closing_message.description: Final slide message. e.g. 'Thank you to every student, teacher, and parent who made this day unforgettable.'
